name: PairDict

unions.name: PairDict

values.name: foldl
values.comment:
Reduce the left-right `Pair`s from lowest left to highest left

    brackets=
      fromList
        [ ( '(', ')' )
        , ( '{', '}' )
        ]
    openingAndClosing=
      brackets
      |>foldl
          (\{ left, right } acc->
            acc ++[ String.fromList [ left, right ] ]
          )
          []
      --[ "()", "{}" ]
values.type: (PairDict.Pair comparableLeft comparableRight -> result -> result) -> result -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight -> result

values.name: foldr
values.comment:
Reduce the left-right `Pair`s from highest left to lowest left

    brackets=
      fromList
        [ ( '(', ')' )
        , ( '{', '}' )
        ]
    openingAndClosing=
      foldl
        (\{ left, right } acc->
          String.fromList [ left, right ]
        )
        []
      --[ "{}", "()" ]
values.type: (PairDict.Pair comparableLeft comparableRight -> result -> result) -> result -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight -> result

values.name: fromDict
values.comment:
Create a `PairDict` conveniently from `Pair`-`Tuple`s. `left` is the first, `right` is the second.
If right or left values are given multiple times, the value **first** in the `List` is **prefered**.
    
    lowerToUpperLetters=
      Dict.empty
      |>Dict.insert 'a' 'A'
      |>Dict.insert 'b' 'B'

    lowerUpperLetters= fromDict lowerToUpperLetters
values.type: Dict.Dict comparableLeft comparableRight -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight

values.name: fromList
values.type: List.List ( comparableLeft, comparableRight ) -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight

values.name: insert
values.comment:
Put in a left-right-`Pair`
If either value is already present, the **dict is unchanged**.

    empty
    |>insert { left= "(", right= ")" }
    |>insert { right= "fire", left= "water" }
    --fromList
    --  [ ( "(", ")" ) ( "water", "fire" ) ]
values.type: PairDict.Pair comparableLeft comparableRight -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight

values.name: leftOf
values.type: comparableRight -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight -> Maybe.Maybe comparableLeft

values.name: lefts
values.comment:
values on the left

    brackets=
      fromList [ ( '(', ')' ), ( '{', '}' ) ]
    opening= lefts brackets

values.name: map
values.comment:
map pairs

    digitNames=
      fromList
        [ ( 0, "zero" )
        , ( 1, "one" )
        ]
    mathSymbolNames=
      digitNames
      |>map
          (\{left,right}->
            { left= String.fromInt left
            , right= right
            }
          )
      |>insert { left= "+", right= "plus" }
values.type: (PairDict.Pair comparableLeft comparableRight -> PairDict.Pair comparableResultLeft comparableResultRight) -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight -> PairDict.PairDict comparableResultLeft comparableResultRight

values.name: removeLeft
values.comment:
remove left-right pair.
If **`left` does not exist**, the `PairDict` is **unchanged**

    empty
    |>insert "(" ")"
    |>removeLeft "("
    --empty
values.type: comparableLeft -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight

values.name: removeRight
values.comment:
remove left-right pair.
If `right` does not exist, the `PairDict` is unchanged

    empty
    |>insert "(" ")"
    |>removeRight ")"
    --empty
values.type: comparableRight -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight

values.name: rightOf
values.comment:
`Just` the right value if the left value is present in the `PairDict`, else `Nothing`

    casedLetters=
      empty
      |>insert { left= 'a', right= 'A' }
      |>insert { left= 'b', right= 'B' }

    lowerCase char=
      Dict.leftOf char casedLetters
values.type: comparableLeft -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight -> Maybe.Maybe comparableRight

values.name: rights
values.comment:
values on the right

    brackets=
      fromList [ ( '(', ')' ), ( '{', '}' ) ]
    closing= rights brackets

values.name: size
values.comment:
How many pairs there are.

    size empty --0
    
    size
      (fromList
        (List.range 0 41 |>List.map (\i-> ( i, i )))
      )
    --42

values.name: swapLeftRight
values.comment:
What has been left → right, right → left.

    upperToLower=
      fromList
        [ ( 'A', 'a' ), ( 'B', 'b' ) ]
    lowerToUpper=
      upperToLower |>swapLeftRight
values.type: PairDict.PairDict left right -> PairDict.PairDict right left

values.name: toDict
values.comment:
convert to a `Dict`, which you can access only from the left

    casedLetters=
      fromList
        [ ( 'A', 'a' ), ( 'B', 'b' ) ]
    lowerFromUpper=
      casedLetters |>toDict
values.type: PairDict.PairDict left right -> Dict.Dict left right

values.name: union
values.comment:
Merge 2 `PairDict`s.
If a value on the left or right is present, prefer the second dict.

    numberOperatorNames=
      fromList
        [ ( '+', "plus" )
        , ( '-', "minus" )
        ]
    boolOperatorNames=
      fromList
        [ ( '∧', "and" )
        , ( '∨', "or" )
        ]
    operatorNames=
      union numberOperatorNames boolOperatorNames
values.type: PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight -> PairDict.PairDict comparableLeft comparableRight
